notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young reaches on a fielder's choice. Bo Bichette scores. Juan Soto to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Juan Soto steals (6) 2nd base. Carson Benge steals (10) home.

notableEvents.label: Juan Soto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Juan Soto grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Juan Soto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Colt Emerson.
